description: Lock the 2026-06-25 source-check of sailing to late Predynastic Egyptian ship-under-sail evidence rather than the old -9500 placeholder.

checks.reason: The corrected sailing node is anchored to Naqada II ship-under-sail evidence, not the old unsupported -9500 placeholder.
Sailing is wind propulsion mounted on boat technology.
The corrected sail form uses square canvas or textile sail material.
Cordage enables rigging lines, stays, sheets, and halyards for sail support and control.
The corrected scope depends on textile sail material, not the specific loom node.
The corrected source-backed scope does not claim hide-sail production.
The broad -8000 trade-routes node predates the corrected source-backed sailing chronology.
Early sail rigging must not predate the corrected sailing node it supports.
Early sail rigging is scoped as support-and-control equipment for sailing vessels.
